svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="20"> <diagram name="Unlock Request Workflow" id="unlock-workflow"> <mxGraphModel dx="987" dy="712" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#7F8C8D;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=0;arcSize=4;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="700" width="920" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#000000;" value="Unlock Request Workflow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="880" x="60" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#000000;" value="Requires counterparty approval" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="880" x="60" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="locked" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#58D68D;strokeColor=#1E8449;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=18;" value="Locked / Sealed" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="400" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pending_er" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2E86C1;strokeColor=#1A5276;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Pending Evaluator Approval" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="110" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pending_ee" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2E86C1;strokeColor=#1A5276;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Pending Evaluatee Approval" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="650" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="draft" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5B041;strokeColor=#B9770E;fontColor=#1B2631;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Draft" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="440" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="req_er" edge="1" parent="1" source="locked" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pending_er" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Evaluatee requests unlock</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="req_ee" edge="1" parent="1" source="locked" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pending_ee" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Evaluator requests unlock</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="approve_er" edge="1" parent="1" source="pending_er" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="draft" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Evaluator approves</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="approve_ee" edge="1" parent="1" source="pending_ee" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="draft" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Evaluatee approves</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decline_er" edge="1" parent="1" source="pending_er" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#E74C3C;strokeWidth=2.5;curved=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="locked" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#6E1B1F;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;border:1px solid #E74C3C;">Evaluator declines</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="170" y="295" /> <mxPoint x="340" y="195" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decline_ee" edge="1" parent="1" source="pending_ee" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#E74C3C;strokeWidth=2.5;curved=1;exitX=0.75;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="locked" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#6E1B1F;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;border:1px solid #E74C3C;">Evaluatee declines</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="830" y="295" /> <mxPoint x="660" y="195" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="resubmit" edge="1" parent="1" source="draft" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;fontSize=12;strokeColor=#BDC3C7;strokeWidth=2;curved=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="locked" value="<div style="padding:8px 14px;background:#4D4D4D;color:#FFFFFF;border-radius:4px;display:inline-block;">Re-submit</div>"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="920" y="645" /> <mxPoint x="920" y="135" /> <mxPoint x="550" y="135" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
